titleStmt.title: SII 17.221: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 221. (A.R. No. 199 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west base of the gōpura of the first prākāra of Chandramaulīśvara temple.

This inscription engraved in late characters records the fixation of the levy on looms at 1/4 paṇam per loom and the resettlement of the weaver community after there had been a quarrel between the various communities, by Nāga Raḍḍiyār and Liṅgā Raḍḍiyār of Śri Naraśā-Paṇḍitar-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvakiṟiti varuṣam Āvaṇimātam 2 10 8 2 śrīmatu rājamanarāja śrī naracāpaṇṭitarṉāṭṭu liṅkāraṭṭiyār ṉākaraṭṭiyār mattumuṇṭāna ṉāṭṭārum kaikkoḷarc cikalattil
peṟapaṭṭu poyi Ūrkkuṭi Eṟāmal yirukkaiyil niṇṇaiyam paṇṇinatu . mātam taṟi 1 � kāl paṇamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom Intapaṭikku pūmiyum Ākācamum Uḷḷamaṭṭuk kellām varukiṟa
turaikaḷ Ellārum yintapaṭikku naṭappikka kaṭa(v)erākavum yitukku yātā moruvar tappitam paṇṇiṉāl Avarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyile kārām pacuve koṇṇa toṣatti le pokakkaṭa (v)erākavum
yinta Eḻuttu Ekāpola Aṅkīṣam Ū
rkkaṇakku nallāpiḷḷai maccinaṉ Aḻakappapiḷḷai Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.221 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
